full_text: 我最近用jaminix3 vi code的一个小工具，在twitter上火了，现在有56万多的浏览，这是一个视频录制工具，它可以连接用户的摄像头。你在录制视频的时候，AI会实时结合你在说的内容给你提问，帮你继续说下去，这就好像给每一个人配了一个视频播客主播，通过提出好的问题来引导你更好的输出。在视频录制之后，还可以导出成MP4文件。我给大家放一下这个视频demo.this is a mini application a vi code with gmini3。Basically, an AI can interview you to ask you questions, almost like a video podcast host to get your creative juices flowing. So you never run out of things to say.So today, I try the new Gemini 3 model.It was pretty mind blowing because I had a few ideas I never was able to vi code with other apps, but I was able to bring it to live using Gemini 3 like this app.One was an app that helps me and my friends find restaurants that are between two locations. The other is this one where the AI can generate real time prompts for recording videos. so you never run out things to say.The idea came from like I often have these coffee chats with friends who are in like a far place like we would be miles apart and I want to find a location that's equi distance to both of us. And before it required a lot of manual like searching on Google Maps. And I just wanted to use the Gemini and Google Maps API integration to.Ultomate that experience.So this one, I feel like I'm watching a lot of video podcasts. and a lot of times it's because the host ask really good questions that get the guest talking. And I want everyone to have their own video podcast host so everyone can record great videos.😊Okay, so let me stop recording. and now I can actually download my video as an MP4 file.Here it is.并且还支持不同的视频比例，以及AI也可以给你生成一些pros来引导你输出。我的整个prom就这么长。大家可以试一试，在google AI studio用jaminize three基本上一次性就能成功。整个也就花了10分钟左右。这个prom也在我的AI学习网站上，网站入口在我的主页签名里，大家划到最底端有一个pros，然后点这个video recorder with life prompting，这里有英文版和中文版可以一键复制。
